faction.name: Scute Confederacy
faction.people: Reptilian people, including various snake types and formidable alligator- and crocodile-like folk
faction.homeland: Jungle-like tropics and large islands in the eastern territories
faction.defining influence: Perpetual threat of elemental chaos from Igni, The Raging Maw

resources.name: The Strongest Booze
resources.significance: Famously potent spirit, valuable trade commodity

resources.significance: Famous export, forms lucrative black market commodity

resources.name: Colorful Birds & Feathers
